debug_info.goal:
d₁ : Type u_1
d₂ : Type u_2
d₃ : Type u_3
d₄ : Type u_4
d₅ : Type u_5
d₆ : Type u_6
inst✝⁹ : Fintype d₁
inst✝⁸ : Fintype d₂
inst✝⁷ : Fintype d₃
inst✝⁶ : Fintype d₄
inst✝⁵ : Fintype d₅
inst✝⁴ : Fintype d₆
inst✝³ : DecidableEq d₁
inst✝² : DecidableEq d₂
inst✝¹ : Nonempty d₁
inst✝ : Nonempty d₂
⊢ Nonempty (CPTPMap d₁ d₂ ℂ)

failed_attempts:
haveI := Classical.inhabited_of_nonempty (inferInstance : Nonempty d₁)
  haveI := Classical.inhabited_of_nonempty (inferInstance : Nonempty d₂)
  exact nonempty_of_inhabited

haveI : Inhabited d₂ := Classical.inhabited_of_nonempty ‹_›
  exact ⟨CPTPMap.const (MState.pure default)⟩

haveI := Classical.inhabited_of_nonempty ‹Nonempty d₁›
  haveI := Classical.inhabited_of_nonempty ‹Nonempty d₂›
  infer_instance

let y := Classical.choice ‹Nonempty d₂›
  exact ⟨CPTPMap.replacement (MState.pure y)⟩

haveI := Classical.inhabited_of_nonempty (inferInstance : Nonempty d₂)
  exact ⟨CPTPMap.const (MState.pure default)⟩

let x := Classical.choice ‹Nonempty d₂›
  exact ⟨CPTPMap.const (MState.pure x)⟩

haveI : Inhabited d₂ := Classical.inhabited_of_nonempty ‹_›
  exact ⟨CPTPMap.const (MState.pure default)⟩
successful_attempts:
haveI := Classical.inhabited_of_nonempty (inferInstance : Nonempty d₂)
  exact ⟨CPTPMap.replacement (MState.pure default)⟩

have : Nonempty (MState d₂) := inferInstance
  exact ⟨replacement (Classical.choice this)⟩

haveI : Inhabited d₂ := Classical.inhabited_of_nonempty ‹Nonempty d₂›
  exact ⟨CPTPMap.replacement (MState.pure default)⟩
